reviews.comment:
Domingo 19/01/25 el playero encargado del turno tarde no tenía ganas de venderme unas lámparas de stop y guiño argumentando q no tenía, me habló de mala gana y de mala manera, vale aclarar que previamente a la mañana fui y me mostraron q tenían pero no sabía el tipo exacto de lamparita, así q desarmé el faro en el hotel y volví a la YPF ya con el modelo justo.
Señores de ACA muchas personas viajamos los domingos y sus empleados deben tener predisposición de un lunes igualmente.

(Translated by Google)
On Sunday, January 19, 2025, the gas station attendant on the afternoon shift refused to sell me brake and turn signal bulbs, claiming he didn't have them. He spoke to me rudely and without regard for the customer. It's worth noting that I had gone earlier that morning and they showed me they had them, but I didn't know the exact type of bulb. So I took the headlight apart at the hotel and returned to the YPF station with the correct model.
ACA representatives, many people travel on Sundays, and your employees should be as helpful as on a Monday.

reviewReply.comment:
Buenas tardes
Lamentamos su experiencia. Nos ocuparemos de lo sucedido gracias por hacernos conocer la situación

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15724533271079356908/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfOTdpVGZ3EAE
